attacking_style: Launches decisive moves 4-6km from summit finishes on HC climbs, preferring calculated mid-range attacks over explosive accelerations. Struggles to follow when others attack but can sustain tempo at threshold.
team_tactics: UAE typically protects him through team pacing rather than aggressive positioning. When isolated on final climbs, shows vulnerability—requires domestique support deep into ascents. Team prioritizes him as Plan B when Pogačar/Ayuso unavailable.
terrain_preference: Excels on sustained HC climbs of moderate gradient (8-12%). Exposed on extreme gradients near 20% and technical descents in wet conditions. Strong time trialist for a climber, particularly on longer efforts (25km+).
vulnerability: Cracks on 3rd-week mountain stages in Grand Tours, particularly at altitude. Prone to positioning errors (echelon splits, wrong turns under pressure). Fails to respond when isolated without team support on steepest gradients.
key_patterns: Third-week fade pattern across multiple GTs: lost Giro pink on Stelvio, struggled as Vuelta domestique late
Attacks 4-6km from finish on HC climbs (Giro stage win, Catalunya stages) but cannot follow explosive accelerations
Strong TT for climber: beat specialists, minimal losses to pure chronomen, erases deficits in second half
Positioning errors under pressure: caught in echelon splits, wrong turn cost 20sec, early splits requiring chases
Podium ceiling player: consistent top-5 finishes but loses time when defending against pure climbers like Roglič/Thomas
Hunts bonus seconds aggressively even when in race lead, showing tactical GC awareness on non-mountain stages
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 showed consistency (Giro podium, first Portuguese GT podium since 1970s) but confirmed ceiling as support rider for UAE's A-list. No progression in defeating elite climbers.
